business_type: Small direct-to-consumer e-commerce brand selling handmade home decor products
current_role: Owner-operator managing listings, marketing, customer support, and fulfillment coordination
weekly_tasks_text: Write and update product descriptions; respond to customer questions about shipping, materials, and customization; process new orders and coordinate packing; track delayed shipments; send order status updates; create weekly email campaigns; post product photos and promotions on Instagram and Pinterest; handle return and refund requests; review inventory levels; analyze which products are selling best.
current_tools_text: Shopify for storefront, Gmail for support, Instagram and Pinterest for marketing, Canva for visuals, Mailchimp for email campaigns, Google Sheets for inventory, Shippo for shipping, Stripe and PayPal for payments.
top_time_sinks_text: Answering repeated shipping and customization questions; writing product descriptions and marketing copy; manually checking delayed shipments; creating email campaigns from scratch; updating inventory spreadsheets; handling return requests case by case.
error_sensitive_areas_text: Customer shipping addresses; custom product details; refund eligibility; inventory availability; delivery promises; payment and order status.
customer_facing_areas_text: Customer support emails; Shopify order updates; product pages; email campaigns; Instagram comments and DMs; return and refund communication.
primary_goal_text: Reduce customer support load and improve marketing consistency without losing the brand's personal handmade tone.
things_owner_refuses_to_automate_text: Final refund approval; responses to angry customers; custom design decisions; brand voice decisions for major campaigns.
